channel.title: Mukesh Kumar Singh — AI Security Journal
channel.description: Daily field notes on AI security, operational assurance, incident response, DFIR, threat intelligence, and standards.

item.title: AI Vulnerability Discovery Needs an Operational Coordination Layer
item.description: What a new U.S. AI–cyber initiative means for vulnerability validation, disclosure, remediation, and assurance evidence.

item.title: AI-Assisted Cybercrime Is Becoming an Operational Signal
item.description: Why defenders should measure attacker workflow compression rather than wait for fully autonomous attacks.

item.title: National Cyber Exercises Should Test Decisions, Not Theatre
item.description: What large hybrid-attack exercises must preserve to produce useful assurance evidence.

item.title: Disrupting Ransomware Infrastructure: The Enabling Layer Matters
item.description: Why incident analysis should look beyond payload operators to infrastructure and service dependencies.

item.title: Critical Cloud Oversight Moves Resilience Beyond the Customer Boundary
item.description: What UK oversight of critical technology providers means for cloud concentration and dependency risk.
